channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Uncertainty at Shangri-La: Will America’s Indo-Pacific Allies Hedge?
item.description: The Asian security summit takes place amid growing concerns over Iran and China.

item.title: DOJ Takes On Leftist Attempt To Punish Any Lawyer Who Disagrees With Democrats
item.description: A new DOJ lawsuit is a crucial step against an un-American campaign targeting lawyers and advocates of disfavored causes.

item.title: The AI smear machine: How campaign ads are tricking older voters
item.description: Deepfake political ads are appearing in races from Kentucky to Los Angeles, as George Gerbo examines their impact.

item.title: The Disappearing Reappearing Iran Deal
item.description: Negotiations remain uncertain, but the situation is far from an unconditional surrender.
